textByHash.04ca04b697c3baa64512b76e5ee206b3d4a56df7: I know only what my eldersss passssed down. Very little.
textByHash.0ad288a8ebb291e922b8a33c4969319fdd6594c7: K'uhul ajaw isss the name we ssspeak. You manfolk ssspeak a different name.
textByHash.1562bcf332708f119fe0507adc55ba2b87cc8780: Perhapsss. But why shhhould I help you?
textByHash.2121339e297deb9d816eebcbf2b774e7a6b90532: I am a shhhaman. I need no help from humansss.
textByHash.46a54b3d8a00555f26d01deffae4289c7e2c81bb: Magesss? You know of the Yo'kal ahk?
textByHash.56d6647bcfc12c3c1c4e599aa2dca203c8d36475: Yesss. The egg isss marked with the sssymbol of our massster. Go fassst human.
textByHash.68f1ea2614b205f3cf33b9a03a265a560ba8dcab: The hatching area in the ssswamp, to the sssouth wessst of here. My lassst egg isss there. If I go and it ssstays, it will die in thisss falssse war.
textByHash.695ae34501b66184a8b7950939f560116f395fd0: Many generationsss have come and gone sssince he walked amongssst usss.
textByHash.752bc17a7e5162daec4daaaa72b225dee1ec593b: Yesss. I can give you the key, but firssst I need my lassst egg.
textByHash.777a036627f7274c464c25a0ee282c9bb2737469: And I could shhhout for help. Humansss are not meant to be in thisss temple. Do you think you can sssurvive usss all?
textByHash.79b9025785b32bc974626a3b5e709cb9b46d713e: Ye niauh, human. Perhapsss we will meet again.
textByHash.7cf5ffa32c336f9ec2f1c89daa70204ae17b33b0: Yesss. I can give you the key, but firssst I need my lassst egg. It'sss at the hatching area in the ssswamp, to the sssouth wessst of here.
textByHash.7e4a5a7801d441cb941988e16bfe410534a3ea48: I am done with thisss fighting. I want to ssserve our massster in other waysss.
textByHash.85690469e768a17e8d437ba05716cbf6b2923a22: Of courssse, sssome of usss remember the high ssspeech out old massster ssspoke in.
textByHash.b1b45ea65f7cd1af33185380f06b8c4e9ed87dfc: A trade? Yesss, that worksss well.
textByHash.b4ce81224c6288d47b39fcda113596867c35d653: It isss the name we ussse for the mage you ssspeak of. In your ssspeach, he hasss another name.
textByHash.baae00c6a7e4a4b8cd39df1300417747079e22fc: Thisss isss our temple, we don't usssually get many visssitorsss... We make sssacrifice, offeringsss to our massster.
textByHash.bc42e6332e7d4cb0ace32f01cbe88fedc7927d3a: Yesss, we ssspeak the language of war far better. It isss the only way we know of.
textByHash.befbc4aead3f1cf4a9049c88f3f5fb145608f9d9: The mage you ssspeak of. He sssends us to fight the humansss. He sssays we mussst do it for our massster, but he isss long gone.
textByHash.c4a2c663b6863c2dbd105a1a68a74c9c14486079: It is closssed, but there are keysss. We shhhamansss carry them.
textByHash.dea22b793fdc947b181667ed222ede0688ac342e: Ussse the key I gave you. That will get you inssside. But be cautiousss of the Yo'kal ahk human. He isss very dangerousss.
textByHash.e08f2fffe3c28483e9f3ca5c23dc596fb4a8a562: It isss marked with the sssymbol of our massster. Go fassst human.
textByHash.ebd8b58aff5a28cc0dbb72bfd2a4d9c8fc4aebf5: Thank you, human. You have given usss a chance for a new ssstart. Here isss the key.
textByHash.f55c75c2bd0a32a1dae5a387ca3a2efd2ac76cc2: Be cautiousss of the Yo'kal ahk human. He isss very dangerousss.
textByHash.fcef2f2e1be697a6ba476f76daa5c1db480a8098: He hasss been here sssince our massster ssstill walked among usss. He wasss sssealed away before, but they releasssed him so he could guide usss.
textByHash.fe84563bde5ae29732441b1d9822adafe5db5b19: Thisss and that. Whatever out massster desssiresss.
